name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.DimensionValueUnits
summary: The units usable with the dimensions.

enum_values.name: Automatic
enum_values.summary: The unit of the value is selected automatically.

enum_values.name: Millimeter
enum_values.summary: The value is shown in millimeters.

enum_values.name: Centimeter
enum_values.summary: The value is shown in centimeters.

enum_values.name: Meter
enum_values.summary: The value is shown in meters.

enum_values.name: Inch
enum_values.summary: The value is shown in inches.
